notes: Pickleheads lists exactly 3 locations for Belmont, CA totaling 5 courts: Alexander Park (2 courts), Hallmark Park (2 courts), and On Call Pickleball (1 court). Only the first two are real PUBLIC venues and are included below. On Call Pickleball is explicitly tagged 'Private' by Pickleheads itself (1 outdoor concrete court, tape lines, portable nets, reservations not available, only 1 registered player, submitted by a single user credited as 'Ahmad Reza Fattahi') -- it reads as a community-submitted private court, not a business or membership club, and its stated address (2525 Buena Vista Ave, Belmont, CA 94002) independently resolves to Cipriani Elementary School / Cipriani Dog Park / Footsteps Child Care, not any identifiable pickleball facility, reinforcing that this is very likely a private court near that address rather than a public amenity. Excluded per this task's 'real PUBLIC venue' scope (dedicated courts, shared/striped tennis courts, or a membership indoor club only) -- see https://www.pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/belmont/on-call-pickleball. Also investigated and excluded, none of which turned out to be real Belmont public pickleball venues on inspection: Notre Dame de Namur University (private-university campus tennis courts at Ralston Ave & Chula Vista Dr; NDNU's own recreation info describes intramural sports for students/staff/faculty; GlobalPickleball Network is the only source that lists it at all and tags it 'Private' itself; no evidence anywhere of pickleball striping or public/community access) -- excluded as not public. Carlmont High School, 1400 Alameda de las Pulgas (7 tennis courts rentable via the district's Facilitron system per the city's facility directory) -- excluded because zero sources (Pickleheads, Bounce, GlobalPickleball Network, teachme.to) describe pickleball lines or pickleball use there; including it would mean inventing a fact no source states. Swimply's Belmont listings (private backyard courts rented by the hour, exact address hidden until booking) -- excluded as private residential rentals, not identifiable public venues with a fixed disclosed address, and not the 'membership indoor club' type of private facility this task's scope allows. Also ruled out as false-positive 'Belmont' results surfaced by radius-based aggregator searches and one generic web-search synthesis (they are real venues, just not in Belmont): The HUB Silicon Valley (actually Campbell, CA), Canada College Athletic Center (actually Woodside/Redwood City, CA), Highlands Park (actually San Carlos, CA), Beresford Park (actually San Mateo, CA) -- classic city-collision noise, consistent with this repo's documented risk of aggregator searches bleeding in neighboring-city results. Separately, several raw 'Belmont' search hits (e.g. 'Town Field', 'Club Piklbal!', assorted country clubs) were for Belmont, MA / NH / NC / VA, not Belmont, CA, and were discarded on inspection. Both included venues (Alexander Park, Hallmark Park) are run under the same City of Belmont program -- a single official page titled 'Tennis & Pickleball Court Reservations' (belmont.gov) covers both, and both are bookable through the same third-party platform, Rec (rec.us/belmont). This research verified the live booking pages directly: rec.us/alexandercourts and rec.us/hallmarkcourts each show a real, working calendar with a distinct 'Pickleball' reservation category separate from 'Tennis' (Alexander had an open 1:00pm slot on the day this was checked, Sat Jul 11 2026; Hallmark was fully booked that day with the next opening Mon Jul 13), and both list operating hours of 8:00am-6:00pm. This directly contradicts Pickleheads' own Hallmark Park page, which states outright 'No, you cannot reserve courts at Hallmark Park' -- Pickleheads appears to simply be out of date on this specific point (its Alexander Park page is more cautious/consistent with reality, stating only 'we're not sure if reservations are available or required'). Reservable/hours fields below were set from the directly-observed live Rec system rather than from Pickleheads' page text, for this reason. The City of Belmont's own facility-directory pages additionally state general park grounds (as opposed to the booking system specifically) are open 'sunrise to sunset.' One data-quality curiosity worth flagging: the City of Belmont's own facility-directory pages (fetched directly, not a search synthesis) list Alexander Park's ZIP code as '94402' -- which is actually San Mateo's ZIP -- while every other source (a verified Google Maps pin/cid, Pickleheads, GlobalPickleball Network, Bounce, teachme.to) agrees on 94002, Belmont's actual ZIP. Used 94002 in the address field as the overwhelmingly-corroborated correct value; flagging the apparent typo on the city's own site in case a human wants to report it back to Belmont Parks & Rec. Both venues' googleMapsUrl cid values were extracted from Google Maps' own place URL (the hex feature ID after the colon in the '0x...:0x...' pair, converted from hex to decimal) and independently verified by loading https://maps.google.com/?cid=<value> and confirming it resolves to the correct named park at the correct address. A public Pickleheads group, 'Eastern Mountain Top Pickleball Club' (2.0-2.5 skill, ~125 members), is listed as playing at both Alexander and Hallmark; a second group, 'San Diego Pickleheads West Coast Chapter' (2.0-2.5 skill, ~200 members), is listed at Hallmark specifically. Not written into the 'skill' field since these describe specific clubs/groups rather than a stated venue-wide skill policy, but noted here and in each venue's own notes for context. No indoor pickleball-specific club or chain (Chicken N Pickle, The Picklr, In2Pickle, Life Time, etc.) was found with a Belmont, CA location.

venues.name: Alexander Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court. City of Belmont's facility directory categorizes the courts as "Tennis Courts" (part of the same combined Tennis & Pickleball Court Reservations program as Hallmark Park); Pickleheads confirms 2 outdoor pickleball courts here but doesn't independently describe the surface material or say whether lines are dedicated or overlaid on the tennis court.
venues.netType: Not specified -- no source explicitly states net type for this court. Given the city's "Tennis Courts" categorization and the shared reservation system with Hallmark Park (which Pickleheads confirms uses tennis nets), a shared tennis net is plausible but not independently confirmed here.
venues.reservable: Reservable via the city's Rec platform (rec.us/alexandercourts); walk-up/drop-in play is available whenever no reservation is active, per the City of Belmont's facility page. Confirmed directly by loading the live rec.us/alexandercourts booking calendar, which shows a working "Pickleball" reservation category (separate from "Tennis") with an open slot. Pickleheads itself does not confirm reservation status either way ("we're not sure if reservations are available or required").
venues.hours: 8:00am-6:00pm per the live rec.us/alexandercourts booking system; City of Belmont's park page separately states the general park grounds are open sunrise to sunset.
venues.weather: Mid-Peninsula hill town -- milder and less fog-prone than the coast; warm, dry summers (mid-70s degF) with a morning marine layer that usually burns off by afternoon
venues.notes: Address, court count (2 outdoor), and free price corroborated by 6+ independent sources (Pickleheads, City of Belmont via two separate facility-directory pages, GlobalPickleball Network, Bounce, teachme.to, tennispronow.com). City's own facility-directory page lists this park's ZIP as 94402 (a likely typo -- that's actually San Mateo's ZIP); used 94002 instead since a verified Google Maps pin and every aggregator agree on 94002. Surface/net type: city categorizes the courts as 'Tennis Courts' (same combined program as Hallmark Park); Pickleheads confirms 2 outdoor courts but doesn't independently describe surface material or net type for this specific court, so netType is left 'Not specified' rather than assumed identical to Hallmark's tennis-net setup. Lights: no source found either way, left 'Not specified' -- do not assume unlit just because neighboring Hallmark Park is confirmed unlit by a different source. Reservable/hours confirmed directly by loading the live rec.us/alexandercourts booking calendar: 8:00am-6:00pm, with a 'Pickleball' reservation category distinct from 'Tennis', and an open slot at 1:00pm on the day this was checked (Sat Jul 11 2026); city's general park page separately states the grounds are open sunrise to sunset. googleMapsUrl cid extracted from Google Maps' own place URL (hex feature id converted to decimal) and verified by loading the resulting maps.google.com/?cid= link directly and confirming it resolves to Alexander Park at this address. Pickleheads-listed group Eastern Mountain Top Pickleball Club (Public, 2.0-2.5 skill, ~125 members) plays here.

venues.name: Hallmark Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court; pickleball lines overlaid on an existing tennis court (per Pickleheads).
venues.netType: Tennis net -- taller than a regulation pickleball net, since play is on lines overlaid on the existing tennis court (per Pickleheads).
venues.reservable: Reservable via the city's Rec platform (rec.us/hallmarkcourts); walk-up/drop-in play is available whenever no reservation is active, per the City of Belmont's facility page ("You may reserve a court here"). Confirmed directly by loading the live rec.us/hallmarkcourts booking calendar, which shows a working "Pickleball" reservation category (fully booked on the day checked, next opening Mon Jul 13 2026). This directly contradicts Pickleheads' own page for this venue, which states "No, you cannot reserve courts at Hallmark Park" -- treated as outdated on this specific point given the directly-observed live booking system; see notes.
venues.hours: 8:00am-6:00pm per the live rec.us/hallmarkcourts booking system; City of Belmont's park page separately states the general park grounds are open sunrise to sunset.
venues.weather: Mid-Peninsula hill town -- milder and less fog-prone than the coast; warm, dry summers (mid-70s degF) with a morning marine layer that usually burns off by afternoon
venues.notes: Address, court count (2 outdoor), free price, and the tennis-court/taller-net setup corroborated by 5+ independent sources (Pickleheads, City of Belmont via two separate facility-directory pages, GlobalPickleball Network, Bounce). Amenities taken from the city's own facility-directory listing (Drinking Fountain, Jogging Track, Playground, Tennis Courts) -- note this does NOT list restrooms, contradicting a lower-confidence WebSearch-synthesis claim that restrooms exist here; trusted the direct primary-source page over the synthesis and left restrooms out of amenities. Lights: PeninsulaTennisLeague.com states 0 lighted courts at this facility, recorded as lights:false on that basis (a single source, but a tennis-specific directory that tracks lighting explicitly). Reservable/hours confirmed directly by loading the live rec.us/hallmarkcourts booking calendar: 8:00am-6:00pm, with a working 'Pickleball' reservation category (fully booked on the day this was checked, Sat Jul 11 2026, next opening Mon Jul 13) -- this directly contradicts Pickleheads' own page for this venue, which states 'No, you cannot reserve courts at Hallmark Park.' Treated the directly-observed live booking system as authoritative over Pickleheads' page text, which appears outdated on this specific point; flagging clearly here in case a human wants to independently re-verify. googleMapsUrl cid extracted from Google Maps' own place URL (hex feature id converted to decimal) and verified by loading the resulting maps.google.com/?cid= link directly and confirming it resolves to Hallmark Park at this address. Two Pickleheads-listed groups play here: Eastern Mountain Top Pickleball Club (Public, 2.0-2.5 skill, ~125 members) and San Diego Pickleheads West Coast Chapter (Public, 2.0-2.5 skill, ~200 members). Park also borders a trailhead with access to the Crystal Springs Country Course per the city's page (not pickleball-relevant, noted for completeness only).
